description: Product Description Universal 5V 3A AC/DC Adapter: Power Your Devices Safely & Efficiently​ This versatile 5V 3A power adapter is your all-in-one solution for a wide range of household electronics. It converts AC power from a wall outlet (100-240V) to stable 5V DC power, making it perfect for international use. The included 8 tips ensure compatibility with countless devices, eliminating the need for multiple chargers. Wide Compatibility for Home, Office, and Entertainment​ Ideal for powering your baby monitor, record player, LED light strips, massage gun, Bluetooth speaker, security camera, router, and more. It reliably replaces lost or damaged power supplies, ensuring your essential devices stay powered up. Check your device's required voltage and current (e.g., 5V 1.5A) to confirm compatibility. Warm Tips: 1. Please find the spec label of your device and check the working voltage. It should be 5V DC, not be AC 5V or lower/higher than 5V DC. Otherwise, your device will not work or be damaged. 2. Check the max current your device will draw. It should be equal to or less than 3A, such as 2.5A, 2.0A, 1.5A, 1.0A. Otherwise, your device won’t work well and the power supply will be damaged very soon. 3. Check the power input port of your device. Its outer diameter should be 5.5mm; inner core diameter should be 2.5mm or 2.1mm. Inner core polarity should be"+", exterior polarity should be" - ". 4. If you have a power supply for reference, their output voltage, plug size, polarity should be the same .If our current is equal to or higher than original one’s, then our will work with your device. 5. If you purchase the adapter charger and find that you cannot charge the battery, it may be that your battery's life has expired or is damaged. Interchangeable Tips: ​ ​ Comes with a selection of the most common DC tip types (5.5*2.5mm, 5.5 * 2.1mm, 4.0 * 1.7mm, 3.5 * 1.35mm 3.0*1.1mm 2.5*0.7mm Type C, Mini USB, Micro USB, LED Terminal) to maximize compatibility.
